heading: Social security tax
label: 1309 Social security tax
text: Amounts made available for the compensation of officers and employees of the United States Government may be used to pay taxes imposed on an agency as an employer under chapter 21 of the Internal Revenue Code of 1986 ( et seq.).26 U.S.C. 3101
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised SectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)130931:699a., .July 15, 1952, ch. 758, § 141066 Stat. 661The word “Amounts” is substituted for “Appropriations and funds” to eliminate unnecessary words. The words “salaries, wages, or” are omitted as being included in “compensation”.
Amendments1986— substituted “Internal Revenue Code of 1986” for “Internal Revenue Code of 1954”.Pub. L. 99–514
